docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,236.40 FILED BY DIXON, HILLARY AS TO DEFENDANT BYRNE, KATHARINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-27-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BYRNE, KATHARINE
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT BYRNE, KATHARINE
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-18-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY DIXON, HILLARY BYRNE, KATHARINE
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-18-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-18-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. CLERK: B.PAREDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIXON, HILLARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BYRNE, KATHARINE $2,236.40 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,286.40 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
